summary: Iteration 17: Temporary file upload feature testing. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend checks passed. New endpoints POST /api/chat/upload-temp and POST /api/chat/save-temp-to-source are fully functional. Frontend paperclip button, file input, and save-to-sources prompt correctly implemented.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 with status=healthy
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin@ai.planetworkspace.com / Admin@123456 returns token + user
Backend: POST /api/auth/login wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/chat/upload-temp with CSV file returns 200 with temp_file_id, filename, file_type
Backend: POST /api/chat/upload-temp without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/chat/upload-temp returns 405 (Method Not Allowed)
Backend: POST /api/chat/upload-temp with PDF file returns 200 with temp_file_id
Backend: POST /api/chat/upload-temp with unsupported file type (.exe) returns 400
Backend: POST /api/chat/save-temp-to-source with non-existent temp_file_id returns 404
Backend: POST /api/chat/save-temp-to-source without auth returns 401
Backend: Full upload-then-save flow: CSV upload → save-to-source returns 200 with source_id
Backend: POST /api/chats/{chat_id}/messages with temp_file_id=null does NOT return 422 (schema accepts field)
Backend: POST /api/chats/{chat_id}/messages with temp_file_id='string' does NOT return 422 (schema accepts field)
Backend: GET /api/chats/{chat_id}/messages returns 200 with uploadedFile field in MessageResponse schema
Frontend: Login with admin@ai.planetworkspace.com / Admin@123456 succeeds
Frontend: Project chat (7d34ab68) - data-testid='chat-page' found, no errors
Frontend: Project chat - data-testid='chat-paperclip-btn' FOUND and VISIBLE and ENABLED
Frontend: Project chat - #chat-temp-file-input EXISTS, type=file, accept=.jpg,.jpeg,.png,.pdf,.xlsx,.xls,.csv,.docx
Frontend: Project chat - data-testid='send-message-btn' FOUND
Frontend: Project chat - data-testid='chat-input' FOUND
Frontend: Project chat - data-testid='chat-plus-btn' FOUND (visible for project chats)
Frontend: Quick chat (e4bd6f5f) - data-testid='chat-paperclip-btn' FOUND and VISIBLE
Frontend: Quick chat - #chat-temp-file-input EXISTS with correct accept types
Frontend: Quick chat - data-testid='chat-plus-btn' NOT visible (correct for quick chats)
Frontend: Quick chat - data-testid='send-message-btn' FOUND
Frontend: Quick chat - 'Quick Chat' badge visible
Frontend: Zero error elements on project chat page
Frontend: Zero error elements on quick chat page
critical_code_review_comments: INFO: save-temp-to-source currently calls get_embedding() (await db.source_chunks.insert_one with embedding) - if embedding service is slow, the save operation could timeout for large files. Consider async background processing for chunking+embedding.
INFO: temp_files.py line 219: The message in save response uses Russian text 'сохранён в источники проекта' - consistent with app language
INFO: temp_file content is injected into Claude system prompt in messages.py line 575-596 - up to 8000 chars of text content, full base64 for images. This is correct behavior.

INFO: pendingTempFile save prompt (data-testid='save-temp-file-prompt') only appears after AI responds to a message with a temp file AND chat has a projectId. Quick chats will NOT show the save prompt. This is by design per the PRD.
seed_data_creation: Created test quick chat 'Test Quick Chat' (id: e4bd6f5f-0d3b-4065-9e43-ec69acf096a4) for testing. Uploaded 2 temp CSV files via /api/chat/upload-temp (deleted on save). Saved 1 CSV source to project 560694a9.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Temp file upload feature fully verified. Key IDs: project=560694a9-6522-4dda-bc5e-f8d81f329cbe, project chat=7d34ab68-60b5-44d4-9468-cf8f93fead5b, test quick chat=e4bd6f5f-0d3b-4065-9e43-ec69acf096a4. New endpoints: POST /api/chat/upload-temp (multipart: file+chat_id) → returns {temp_file_id, filename, file_type, content_preview, stored_path}. POST /api/chat/save-temp-to-source (JSON: temp_file_id, filename, file_type, chat_id, project_id) → returns {source_id, chunk_count, message}. Frontend: paperclip btn at data-testid='chat-paperclip-btn', file input at #chat-temp-file-input, save prompt at data-testid='save-temp-file-prompt' (only shown in project chats after AI response). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_temp_file_upload.py.
